name: model-router
description: Scores each prompt's complexity and routes to the right model tier (GPT-5 mini / GPT-5 / GPT-5 Pro on Codex). Announces the chosen model before acting.

interface.shortDescription: Routes each prompt to the right model by complexity
interface.longDescription: Scores every prompt with fast heuristics and routes it to the right GPT tier, announcing the choice before acting and recommending a /model switch when you're below the tier.
defaultPrompt: Refactor the auth service and prove the token refresh is race-free.
What is a closure in JavaScript?
